note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Diabetic Left plantar measures aprx 1.2 x 1.6cm, depth 0.6cm.
Min drainage serous. Heel wound also eval - L heel 0.7x1.0, 0.3cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left plantar wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left plantar measures 1.2 cm x 1.6 cm x 0.6 cm.
  Wound bed: 25% slough, 75% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left plantar — not improving.
Plan: Foam dressing change daily. Debridement consult ordered.
